Name: profiles
Description: Stores user profile information and wallet balances
Details: Fields: id, email, full_name, phone, country_code, address, city, state, country, postal_code, deposit_balance, roi_balance, bonus_balance, withdrawal_balance, total_invested, total_withdrawn, total_roi_earned, total_referral_earned, last_roi_credit_at, referral_code, referred_by, referral_level, performance_level, performance_points, active_referrals, coupon_count, kyc_status, kyc_document_url, kyc_submitted_at, kyc_verified_at, is_active, is_admin, email_verified, created_at, updated_at

Name: transactions
Details: Fields: id, user_id, type, amount, fee, net_amount, status, tx_hash, network, admin_note, processed_at, created_at, updated_at

Name: referrals
Details: Fields: id, referrer_id, referred_id, level, commission_earned, status, created_at

Name: notifications
Details: Fields: id, user_id, title, message, type, is_read, created_at

Name: support_tickets
Details: Fields: id, user_id, email, subject, message, status, priority, created_at, updated_at

Name: platform_settings
Details: Fields: key, value, description, updated_at

Name: send-otp
Description: Sends OTP verification code via email
Details: Endpoint: POST /functions/v1/send-otp | Params: email purpose

Name: verify-otp
Details: Endpoint: POST /functions/v1/verify-otp | Params: email otp purpose

Name: create-user
Description: Creates a new user account after OTP verification
Details: Endpoint: POST /functions/v1/create-user | Params: email password full_name referral_code

Name: activate-account
Description: Activates user account via email verification link
Details: Endpoint: POST /functions/v1/activate-account | Params: token

Name: send-auth-link
Description: Sends magic link for passwordless authentication
Details: Endpoint: POST /functions/v1/send-auth-link | Params: email

Name: reset-password-otp
Details: Endpoint: POST /functions/v1/reset-password-otp | Params: email otp new_password

Name: reset-password-token
Description: Resets password using token from email link
Details: Endpoint: POST /functions/v1/reset-password-token | Params: token new_password

Name: verify-transaction
Description: Verifies blockchain transaction hash for deposits
Details: Endpoint: POST /functions/v1/verify-transaction | Params: transaction_hash network amount

Name: monthly-interest-credit
Description: Automated daily function to credit 10% monthly ROI
Details: Trigger: Cron (0 0 * * *) | Daily calculation and credit

Name: process-auto-withdrawals
Details: Trigger: Cron (0 * * * *) | Checks cooling periods and transfers funds

Name: delete-user
Description: Admin function to delete user account
Details: Endpoint: POST /functions/v1/delete-user | Params: user_id | Auth: Admin

Name: test-email
Details: Endpoint: POST /functions/v1/test-email | Params: to subject body

Name: Users can view own profile
Details: Table: profiles | SELECT | auth.uid() = id

Name: Users can update own profile
Details: Table: profiles | UPDATE | auth.uid() = id

Name: Admins can view all profiles
Details: Table: profiles | SELECT | auth.uid() is admin

Name: Admins can update all profiles
Details: Table: profiles | UPDATE | auth.uid() is admin

Name: Users can view own transactions
Details: Table: transactions | SELECT | auth.uid() = user_id

Name: Users can create transactions
Details: Table: transactions | INSERT | auth.uid() = user_id

Name: Admins can view all transactions
Details: Table: transactions | SELECT | auth.uid() is admin

Name: Admins can update transactions
Details: Table: transactions | UPDATE | auth.uid() is admin

Name: Users can view own referrals
Details: Table: referrals | SELECT | auth.uid() in (referrer_id referred_id)

Name: Admins can view all referrals
Details: Table: referrals | SELECT | auth.uid() is admin

Name: Users can view own notifications
Details: Table: notifications | SELECT | auth.uid() = user_id

Name: Users can update own notifications
Details: Table: notifications | UPDATE | auth.uid() = user_id

Name: Admins can create notifications
Details: Table: notifications | INSERT | auth.uid() is admin

Name: Anyone can create tickets
Details: Table: support_tickets | INSERT | true

Name: Users can view own tickets
Details: Table: support_tickets | SELECT | auth.uid() = user_id OR email = auth.email()

Name: Admins can view all tickets
Details: Table: support_tickets | SELECT | auth.uid() is admin

Name: Admins can update tickets
Details: Table: support_tickets | UPDATE | auth.uid() is admin

Name: Anyone can read settings
Details: Table: platform_settings | SELECT | true

Name: Admins can update settings
Details: Table: platform_settings | UPDATE | auth.uid() is admin
